title: erigeron uniflorus subsp. elborsensis
intro: Erigeron uniflorus subsp. elborsensis, a subspecies of the Fleabane plant, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and Canada. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which can be used to treat wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant has various health benefits, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support immune function. Erigeron uniflorus subsp. elborsensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
